name: Clawvisor
description: Human-in-the-loop security gateway for AI agents. Approves, verifies, and audits every API call across Gmail, GitHub, Slack, and 11+ services — with credential vaulting and prompt injection detection.

skills.name: Approval Gateway
skills.description: Route agent actions through human approval via Telegram, dashboard, or any device before any API call executes.

skills.name: Purpose Verification
skills.description: Verify each agent API call matches its declared purpose, blocking scope creep and prompt injection attempts at the gateway level.

skills.name: Credential Vaulting
skills.description: Store API keys and OAuth tokens in an encrypted vault — agents never see credentials, injected server-side per verified request.
